location: Guaranteed drop from the mini-boss Chief Guardian Arghanthy, found atop the rampart of Guardians' Garrison in the Mountaintops of the Giants.
tactics: Arghanthy wields a giant-sized weapon and hits very hard in melee — respect the wind-up on his swings and don't get greedy for extra hits.
The fight takes place atop a narrow rampart — watch your footing and avoid being knocked toward the edge.
Torrent (spirit steed) is usable here, and Spirit Ashes can help split his aggro if you're struggling solo.
lore: A deceptive white stone shield carved into the likeness of a deformed one-eyed god once worshipped by the giants, said to have been slain by Queen Marika herself. A hidden barrel juts from its open mouth to spit flame.

builds.name: Fire-poke hybrid
builds.why: Its innate Flame Spit skill gives a Strength turtle build ranged fire offense without swapping weapons.

builds.name: Heavy STR turtle
builds.why: Very high physical attack power (175) for a greatshield and near-full physical negation reward committing hard to Strength and equip load.
